summary: Seven military tanks have been assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence, all exhibiting catastrophic structural damage including obliterated hulls and turrets, missing components, and active fire/smoke. The full-scene image confirms a battlefield littered with these destroyed tanks, some still burning, indicating a recent and intense engagement. The functional impact is complete loss of all assessed targets, rendering them incapable of any operational function.
